CustomObject.description: Release-testing harness object the CDC header sink writes one record into per change-event dispatch, capturing the DTO_ChangeEventHeader scalars (change type, entity, record ids) the subscriber Flow received. Change Data Capture is deliberately NOT enabled here so the sink insert never re-fires the dispatch. Inserted from the CDC automated-process transaction, then queried by the release-test verify scripts after the change-event delivery window. Not part of the managed package.
CustomObject.label: Subscriber CDC Marker
